title: Floating Tools
prompt: A wrench and a rubber duck spin toward a control panel.

title: Leaky Air Duct
prompt: Pressure is dropping near a duct with feather stickers on it.

title: Mess Hall Chaos
prompt: Packets of peas and ducks drift everywhere in the mess hall.

title: Escape Pod Check
prompt: Warning lights flash on the escape pod door.

title: Antenna Call
prompt: Ground control pings for a status update.
